title: Turn paintings into billboards
description: This is a resource pack that changes some of the paintings to signboards.
body:
This resource pack makes it easy for you to turn paintings into road signs.
The 1×1 size includes a picture, a PC screen, etc.
2x2 size road signs are used. Useful for multiplayer, etc.
